design_rationale: Ikas-Txiki is a grassroots youth football school. The design needs to be highly operational for managers but retain a vibrant, youthful, and sporty identity. We blend Archetype 6 (Vibrant Play - sky blue, grass green) for approachable interaction with Archetype 2 (Performance Pro - deep athletic navy, sharp contrasts) to ensure professional data legibility and command-center efficiency.

layout.spacing_scale: Generous spacing. Use p-6, p-8 for module containers. p-4 for internal card padding.
layout.border_radius: Rounded-md (6px) or rounded-lg (8px) maximum for a structured, professional feel.
layout.sidebar: Fixed left sidebar, dark navy background (#111827). White icons and text (opacity-80 default, opacity-100 hover). Highlight active state with a left border or sky blue background tint.
layout.dashboard_grid: Control Room Grid. Base grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 with gap-6. Summary cards span 1 col, main charts span 2 cols.
layout.forms: Multi-step or tabbed sections (Personal, Health, Family) to avoid long scrolls. Large tap targets for inputs (min-h-[44px]).

components.buttons: Big, clear buttons. Primary buttons use sky blue (#0EA5E9) with hover state darkening (#0284C7). Add subtle shadow-sm. Use rounded-md.
components.cards: Subtle Neumorphism or Flat Solid. Background white, 1px subtle border (#E5E7EB), no shadow by default. On hover, slight lift (-translate-y-1) and shadow-md.
components.inputs: Shadcn defaults customized with 44px height for better touch/click targets. Focus ring must be sky blue (ring-sky-500).
components.tables: Dense rows, left-aligned text, clear sticky headers. Status badges for players (Active, Pending, Injured) using soft backgrounds and bold text (e.g., bg-green-100 text-green-800).
components.tabs: Override default height to h-auto. Add generous padding for touch targets. Active tab marked with bottom border or solid sky blue background.

interaction_and_motion.hover_states: All interactive elements must visibly change. Buttons darken, cards lift slightly.
interaction_and_motion.transitions: transition-all duration-200 ease-in-out for buttons and cards.
interaction_and_motion.accessibility: Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes.

login_background.description: Young kids playing soccer on a green field. Use with a dark overlay (bg-black/50) for the login page.

dashboard_banner.description: Top-down view of a soccer field. Use as an accent header image for the dashboard or empty states.

team_placeholder.description: Children playing soccer. Can be cropped for a team photo placeholder.

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure the sidebar uses a dark theme for contrast against the light content area.
All summary cards in the dashboard should use a 1px border and a subtle hover effect. Avoid deep drop shadows to keep the UI clean.
Player profiles must be tabbed (Personal, Health, Family, etc.) rather than a single long page.
Apply `data-testid` to all forms, buttons, and navigation links. Example: data-testid='sidebar-nav-players'.
Use 'Outfit' for headers and 'Manrope' for standard text. Import via Google Fonts.
Use Lucide icons for all module navigation.
